basic_details.job_title: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: 187 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the District Programme Officer, Child Development, Varanasi has released a notification for the recruitment of 187 Anganwadi Karyakartri (Anganwadi Worker) posts in the urban and rural areas of Varanasi district, Uttar Pradesh. Only women candidates are eligible to apply. Interested and eligible women candidates can apply online through the official departmental website upanganwadibharti.in from July 1, 2026, till the last date, July 31, 2026 (midnight 12:00 AM). This is a direct recruitment against vacant Anganwadi Karyakartri posts based on honorarium, conducted as per Uttar Pr

application_fee.details: The official notification does not specify any application fee for the Anganwadi Karyakartri posts. Candidates are advised to check the official website upanganwadibharti.in at the time of applying for any fee-related updates.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age will be calculated as on the cut-off date, July 1, 2026. For age verification, the date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate will be considered valid.

qualification.details: Additional eligibility conditions: | Merit will be prepared by adding the marks obtained from Intermediate up to Postgraduate level (higher qualifications add to the merit score). Domicile and caste certificates will be accepted only if issued online through the Tehsil with digital signature and are verifiable online. Income certificates will be accepted only if issued by a competent authority as per UP Government Revenue Section-9 order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj0-9 dated September 30, 2021 (as amended), and must be verifiable online. The prescribed annual poverty-line income limit is ₹46,080 for rural areas and ₹56,460 for urban areas. Widowed applicants must submit a death certificate and family register copy issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer or the concerned Municipal Body. Divorced/deserted applicants must submit a valid order issued by a competent court. Reservation for SC, ST, and OBC categories will be applied as per the applicable government orders governing Anganwadi Karyakartri recruitment.
qualification.domicile: Applicant must be a permanent resident of the Ward/Gram Sabha of the vacant post applied for; applications from outside that Ward/Gram Sabha will be rejected

salary_details.details: Anganwadi Karyakartri: Honorarium of ₹4,500 per month, plus an additional honorarium of ₹1,500 per month currently admissible. | The post of Anganwadi Karyakartri is purely temporary and honorarium-based. The Uttar Pradesh State Employee Service Rules do not apply to this post, and engagement may be terminated at any time as per government directions.

selection_process: Selection will be made purely on the basis of a merit list prepared using educational qualification marks
from Intermediate up to Postgraduate level. No written examination or interview will be conducted for these posts.
how_to_apply: Visit the official departmental website: upanganwadibharti.in
Read the government order and detailed instructions available on the website carefully before applying.
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and residential details.
Upload the required documents as specified on the portal.
Submit the application form before the last date, July 31, 2026 (midnight 12:00 AM).
Applications will be accepted online only. Offline application forms will not be accepted or considered under any circumstances.
important_instructions: Candidates are advised to thoroughly study the government orders and instructions available on the website before applying, to avoid any loss due to errors. This notification is for information purposes only. The entire selection process will be governed by Child Development and Nutrition Section Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated September 17, 2025. In case of any dispute, the provisions mentioned in that government order will prevail. Only women applicants are eligible for the advertised posts. The number of advertised posts may increase or decrease; the updated number will be displayed on the website. Detailed proforma, information, and eligibility criteria are available at upanganwadibharti.in. For further information, candidates can contact the Block Child Development Project Office or the District Programme Officer (Child Development) Office at Vikas Bhawan on any working day. Only the information filled in the online application will be used for selection. No offline documents will be accepted. If any information filled by the applicant on the portal is found to be incorrect, erroneous, or incomplete, the candidature will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 187 Posts at upanganwadibharti.in
content_sections.text: The Office of the District Programme Officer, Child Development, Varanasi has released a notification for the recruitment of 187 Anganwadi Karyakartri (Anganwadi Worker) posts in the urban and rural areas of Varanasi district, Uttar Pradesh. Only women candidates are eligible to apply. Interested and eligible women candidates can apply online through the official departmental website upanganwadibharti.in from July 1, 2026, till the last date, July 31, 2026 (midnight 12:00 AM). This is a direct recruitment against vacant Anganwadi Karyakartri posts based on honorarium, conducted as per Uttar Pradesh Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated September 17, 2025. Notification PDF: Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026 Notification (Letter No. 1219/Ji0Ka0Adhi0/Vigyapti/2026-27, dated July 1, 2026) — Download from the official website

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Overview

rows.details: Office of the District Programme Officer, Child Development, Varanasi

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The 187 vacancies are distributed project-wise (Anganwadi Balvikas Pariyojana) across Varanasi district as follows: Note: The number of advertised posts is subject to increase or decrease, as updated on the official website. Ward/Gram Sabha-wise and category-wise detailed vacancy break-up is displayed on notice boards at the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, and Vikas Khand offices, and is also available at upanganwadibharti.in.

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Additional eligibility conditions: Merit will be prepared by adding the marks obtained from Intermediate up to Postgraduate level (higher qualifications add to the merit score). Domicile and caste certificates will be accepted only if issued online through the Tehsil with digital signature and are verifiable online. Income certificates will be accepted only if issued by a competent authority as per UP Government Revenue Section-9 order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj0-9 dated September 30, 2021 (as amended), and must be verifiable online. The prescribed annual poverty-line income limit is ₹46,080 for rural areas and ₹56,460 for urban areas. Widowed applicants must submit a death certificate and family register copy issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer or the concerned Municipal Body. Divorced/deserted applicants must submit a valid order issued by a competent court. Reservation for SC, ST, and OBC categories will be applied as per the applicable government orders governing Anganwadi Karyakartri recruitment.

rows.details: Only women candidates are eligible to apply
Applicant must be a permanent resident of the Ward/Gram Sabha of the vacant post applied for; applications from outside that Ward/Gram Sabha will be rejected

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age will be calculated as on the cut-off date, July 1, 2026. For age verification, the date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate will be considered valid.

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not specify any application fee for the Anganwadi Karyakartri posts. Candidates are advised to check the official website upanganwadibharti.in at the time of applying for any fee-related updates.

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made purely on the basis of a merit list prepared using educational qualification marks, from Intermediate up to Postgraduate level. No written examination or interview will be conducted for these posts.

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Visit the official departmental website: upanganwadibharti.in Read the government order and detailed instructions available on the website carefully before applying. Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and residential details. Upload the required documents as specified on the portal. Submit the application form before the last date, July 31, 2026 (midnight 12:00 AM). Applications will be accepted online only. Offline application forms will not be accepted or considered under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Remuneration
content_sections.text: Anganwadi Karyakartri: Honorarium of ₹4,500 per month, plus an additional honorarium of ₹1,500 per month currently admissible. The post of Anganwadi Karyakartri is purely temporary and honorarium-based. The Uttar Pradesh State Employee Service Rules do not apply to this post, and engagement may be terminated at any time as per government directions.

content_sections.heading: UP Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates are advised to thoroughly study the government orders and instructions available on the website before applying, to avoid any loss due to errors. This notification is for information purposes only. The entire selection process will be governed by Child Development and Nutrition Section Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated September 17, 2025. In case of any dispute, the provisions mentioned in that government order will prevail. Only women applicants are eligible for the advertised posts. The number of advertised posts may increase or decrease; the updated number will be displayed on the website. Detailed proforma, information, and eligibility criteria are available at upanganwadibharti.in. For further information, candidates can contact the Block Child Development Project Office or the District Programme Officer (Child Development) Office at Vikas Bhawan on any working day. Only the information filled in the online application will be used for selection. No offline documents will be accepted. If any information filled by the applicant on the portal is found to be incorrect, erroneous, or incomplete, the candidature will be rejected.

faq.question: Q1. What is Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Varanasi Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026 is a direct hiring drive by the District Programme Officer (Child Development), Varanasi for 187 Anganwadi Worker (Karyakartri) posts. Applications are online at upanganwadibharti.in from July 1 to July 31, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for these Anganwadi Worker posts?
faq.answer: Only women who are permanent residents of the Ward/Gram Sabha where the vacancy exists are eligible. Applicants must meet the educational, domicile, and category-specific requirements detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies and category-wise split?
faq.answer: There are 187 vacancies across Varanasi district. Category distribution: SC 33, ST 4, OBC 58, Unreserved 92. Posts are allocated project/ward-wise; exact ward-wise break-up is on noticeboards and the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application period and how do I apply?
faq.answer: Online applications are accepted from July 1, 2026, to July 31, 2026 (midnight). Apply only at upanganwadibharti.in, complete the form, upload digital documents, and submit before the deadline. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification is required?
faq.answer: Minimum qualification is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent. Higher qualifications (up to postgraduate) will increase the merit score used for selection.

faq.question: Q6. How is selection made for Anganwadi Karyakartri posts?
faq.answer: Selection is purely merit-based using marks from Intermediate up to Postgraduate level. No written exam or interview will be conducted; merit lists will determine appointments as per the government order.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit and how is age calculated?
faq.answer: Minimum age is 18 years and maximum 35 years as on July 1, 2026. Date of birth recorded in High School marksheet/certificate is considered valid for age verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an application fee?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an application fee. Candidates should check upanganwadibharti.in while applying for any updates on fees or payment instructions.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to apply online?
faq.answer: Typical required documents include Intermediate mark sheet/certificate, domicile (Tehsil-issued) and caste certificate (if applicable) with verifiable digital signatures, income certificate (online-verified), identity proof, and recent passport-size photo and signature as per portal specifications.

faq.question: Q10. What is the honorarium and nature of employment?
faq.answer: Anganwadi Karyakartri posts are temporary and honorarium-based: ₹4,500 per month plus an additional admissible honorarium of ₹1,500 per month. These posts do not fall under Uttar Pradesh State Employee Service Rules and may be terminated as per government directions.
